layout.name: eyeType
layout.title: Eye Type
layout.tooltip: The eye graphic used for this NPC.

layout.name: eyeRotation
layout.title: Eye Rotation
layout.tooltip: The rotation that the NPC's eyes start at (in degrees).

children.name: enabled
children.title: Enabled
children.tooltip: If ticked, the NPC will look at the player if they're nearby.

children.name: maxPlayerDistance
children.title: Maximum Player Distance
children.tooltip: How close a player must be for the NPC to look at them. Set to 0 for no distance limit.
